title: Journey to the Lost City
writer: Fritz Lang, Werner Jörg Lüddecke, Thea von Harbou
actors: Debra Paget, Paul Hubschmid, Walther Reyer
plot: "Journey to the Lost City" is not a specific film by Fritz Lang but the combination of The Tiger of Eschnapur (1959) with its sequel The Indian Tomb (1959), done in 1960 by American International Pictures.
